_meta.purpose: Per-event real-world outcome-known date. Used as the cutoff anchor for zero-bias smoke-test retrieval (Tavily end_date, Kalshi candlestick t). NOT same as Kalshi close_time.
_meta.convention: ISO date YYYY-MM-DD. When uncertain, pick the EARLIER date (more conservative bias guard).

KXCRICKETTESTMATCH-26MAY08PAKBAN.reason: MULTI-DAY EVENT: use match START (May 8). Match runs May 8-12. T-3d=May 5 = truly pre-match for zero bias.
